entry.title: 2020 SAP Crystal Report Product Key Not Valid
entry.content: I purchased 2020 Crystal Reports a few days ago and when I try to install the software on my computer, I get an error message saying my product key is invalid. Is there a way to check to see if the product key is valid or a way to request a different product key?

entry.title: Error P014 when activating Cloud Integration in my account
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to activate Cloud Integration in the Integration Suite and error P014 is occurring as shown in the attached image
Could you help me?

Thanks.

entry.title: Inquiry Regarding SAP SFTP Server Access and Data Transfer Implementation
entry.content:
Estimado equipo,

Actualmente nos enfrentamos a una necesidad crítica de negocio que implica la transferencia diaria de datos confidenciales a nuestro sistema SAP. Dada la importancia y confidencialidad de estos datos, la empresa ha recomendado utilizar el servicio SFTP como la solución más segura para abordar estas preocupaciones.

Como parte de la solución propuesta, los datos se transferirán de forma segura desde el servidor de la aplicación empresarial a otro servidor mediante el servicio SFTP. Es importante tener en cuenta que, debido a consideraciones de seguridad, estamos evitando deliberadamente el uso de un servidor FTP.

Teniendo en cuenta que nuestro entorno de sistemas opera en Rise with SAP Private Cloud, tengo varias preguntas sobre el acceso al servidor SAP SFTP:

  1. ¿Es necesario crear una cuenta SFTP dentro de SAP para habilitar el acceso requerido?
  2. Una vez que se establece la cuenta SFTP, ¿podemos coordinarnos con el equipo de red empresarial para transmitir archivos directamente a las carpetas SAP AL11?
  3. Si el enfoque anterior es viable, ¿quién será responsable de proporcionar los detalles del servidor para los entornos UAT y de producción al equipo de la red empresarial? Los detalles precisos del servidor son cruciales para la entrega precisa de archivos en las carpetas de la aplicación AL11 en SAP, donde se encuentran los directorios de datos.
  4. ¿Cuál sería el procedimiento correcto por parte de SAP para implementar esta configuración? ¿Cómo debemos crear la solicitud de servicio para asegurarnos de que el equipo de ECS la aborde adecuadamente?
  5. Por último, ¿podría confirmar si hay algún costo asociado con la creación de una cuenta SFTP para este servicio?

Le agradecería mucho que compartiera los requisitos previos exhaustivos y las comprobaciones esenciales necesarias para garantizar la ejecución exitosa de estos puntos.

Gracias por su ayuda.

Saludos

entry.title: Delta IDOCs for Material Master using MDG DRF with ALE
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are using MDG DRF with ALE IDOCS for Material Master. We are exploring the possibility of sending only delta IDOCs (i.e. Idocs with delta changes in Materials) instead of sending full material every time it is replicated out from MDG.

We are using standard outbound implementations for Materials and Classification. The configuration for outbound parameter SEND_DELTA_INFO doesn't seem to work.

Any pointers for the same or if anyone has successfully implemented this scenario then would really appreciate guidance on the same.

Thanks

Anuj

entry.title: Re: When deploying an app in Build Apps with Cloud Foundr...
entry.content:
Hi Jakub_Roguski,
Thank you for your answers. I have one more question: What service is activated when you enable the Cloud Foundry environment in the subaccount overview? At the time of deployment, we need to enable the Cloud Foundry environment and create a space, in this process we need to choose a plan "free" or "standard". I understand for your answers that the service is the Cloud Foundry Runtime and in the case of Build Apps, this plan isn't relevant, because the cost is based on the capacity units of the Build Apps plan.

entry.title: Re: QM: Add custom fields to Inspection Plan Header (QP01,2,3)

entry.title: Which website is the best to learn a SAPUI5 javascript language?
entry.content:

I already check this Step 1: Ready... - Documentation - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK (ondemand.com) but I can't find a detailed documentation of javascript for SAPUI5 it only gives me a sample. syntax and result

The documentation im looking for is a documentation like ABAP / Java where it explains the purpose of every keyword/syntax

entry.title: Is there a way to mass delete learning history without engaging support?
entry.content: I have found KBAs from a few years ago about having to engage support for mass deletion of learning history but was wondering if that was still the case. One of our administrators created a curriculum with substitutions and somehow caused the system to create multiple equivalency met records for users that need to be removed. I thought I would just pose the question just in case things have changed. Thank you!

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Excel returns blank page after successful login
entry.content:
Hello,

When trying to test the SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Office  and the SAP Analytics Cloud basic trial instance, I am unable to configure the Tenant correctly. The instructions found at Tenant Configuration state that custom URLs can be configured but I am getting an error in Powershell with the "https://basic-trial-sac.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com" instance. Does the Excel add-in work for the basic trial or is there another configuration issue?

Powershell error:

PS C:\Windows\system32> Set-OrganizationAddInOverrides -ProductId 8a512e2b-c04e-4c06-9235-11b6cd59f584 -AppDomains "https://hcs.cloud.sap","https://basic-trial-sac.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com.sap"
Set-OrganizationAddInOverrides : There was an error uploading the Add-In.
At line:1 char:1
+ Set-OrganizationAddInOverrides -ProductId 8a512e2b-c04e-4c06-9235-11b ...
+ ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    + CategoryInfo          : WriteError: (8a512e2b-c04e-4c06-9235-11b6cd59f584:Guid) [Set-OrganizationAddInOverrides], AddInOverridesCreationException
    + FullyQualifiedErrorId : FailedWriteToExchange,Microsoft.OrganizationAddInPowerShell.Cmdlets.SetOrganizationAddInOverrides

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Future proofing your business with procurement technology
entry.content:
Watch our intro video before you start 

What’s Your Procurement Strategy Persona?

Please record your answers offline to define your persona

1. When it comes to choosing suppliers, your priority is:

  • A) Price and cost savings.
  • B) Quality and reliability.
  • C) Innovation and technology.
  • D) Long-term relationships and collaboration.

2. How do you typically handle contract compliance?

  • A) We focus on price terms and conditions.
  • B) We have a robust monitoring system in place.
  • C) We leverage technology for real-time tracking.
  • D) We emphasize mutual trust and flexibility.

3. What is your approach to managing procurement categories?

  • A) Grouping similar products for bulk purchasing.
  • B) Detailed analysis and specialized management for each category.
  • C) Using advanced software for dynamic category management.
  • D) Collaborative planning with suppliers.

4. In terms of supplier risk management, you:

  • A) Regularly review financial stability and performance.
  • B) Focus on diversifying your supplier base.
  • C) Use predictive analytics to foresee potential risks.
  • D) Build strong, long-term relationships to mitigate risks.

5. What’s your stance on payment terms with suppliers?

  • A) Negotiating the best possible payment terms to improve cash flow.
  • B) Ensuring fair and timely payments to maintain good relationships.
  • C) Utilizing technology to manage and optimize payment schedules.
  • D) Customizing payment terms based on individual supplier agreements.

6. How do you see the role of AI in procurement?

  • A) AI can help reduce costs and find the best deals.
  • B) AI can improve the accuracy and efficiency of procurement processes.
  • C) AI is crucial for gaining strategic insights and recommendations.
  • D) AI can enhance collaboration and decision-making with suppliers.

7. When planning for the future, your main concern is:

  • A) Keeping costs low and maintaining budget control.
  • B) Ensuring the highest quality of goods and services.
  • C) Staying ahead of the competition with cutting-edge technology.
  • D) Building a resilient and adaptable supply chain.

8. What’s your approach to dealing with supply chain disruptions?

  • A) Having a backup plan and alternative suppliers ready.
  • B) Focusing on supplier reliability and performance.
  • C) Utilizing advanced analytics to predict and respond to disruptions.
  • D) Collaborating closely with suppliers to develop contingency plans.

9. How important is it for you to integrate technology in your procurement process?

  • A) It’s important for cost tracking and savings.
  • B) It’s essential for maintaining high standards and efficiency.
  • C) It’s critical for staying innovative and competitive.
  • D) It’s valuable for improving supplier relationships and collaboration.

10. What’s your biggest procurement challenge right now?

  • A) Managing and reducing costs.
  • B) Ensuring contract compliance and quality.
  • C) Keeping up with technological advancements.
  • D) Building and maintaining strong supplier relationships.

Please review your corresponding personality type:

  • Mostly As: Cost Controller 
  • Mostly Bs: Quality Guardian 
  • Mostly Cs: Tech Innovator 
  • Mostly Ds: Relationship Builder 

If you have the same number of answers in two or more personality types, please review all of the videos related to your personalities.

Now you're a step closer towards transforming your procurement organization.

entry.title: Re: Connect SAP Web Intelligence to SAP Datasphere analytic models using OAuth 2.0
entry.content:

Hello

I'm trying to follow the blog but when I try to connect I get the error in the following image. I know that the issue is due to the Redirect URI under the following format: https://*<host>[:<port>]*/biprws/v1/oauth2/callback

How can I validate that this service is configured correctly in the BO or find out if something is missing in the configuration?

Thank you very much for your help

entry.title: PARTE EXCENTA VALES DE DESPENSA
entry.content:
Hola a todos.


Solicito su valioso apoyo con el siguiente tema:


Recien hicimos un Upgrade de nuestro ERP y en las pruebas de nómina no esta calculando correctamente la parte excenta de los vales de despensa (/368) y por ende la parte variable acumulada (/37C). 

Me pueden orientar que me hace falta configurar o por donde revisar para corregir esta situación, cabe mencionar que esto estaba operando correctamente antes del upgrade.

Gracias

Gracias.

Saludos.

entry.title: Re: How to Create And Add Custom Fields to SAP S/4HANA Cl...

I found the bug in this custom field.

If I try the same step to create custom field, it can be correct to save.

However, I create custom field in "Manage Price - Sales", it couldn't be correct to save.

Steps:

First, I maintain the custom field and save it.

( I already add custom fields and enable all cds views / odata service.)

When I refresh this page, It can't be save in table.

 

When I try to create custom field in other app like 'Supplier Quotation', it can be enable and save.

I already check all the steps have been followed, and I adapt UI to create.

Thanks,

Eric

entry.title: How to maintain email template for Account Statement in app Schedule Account Payable Jobs?
entry.content:
How to maintain email template for "Correspondence: Account Statement" in app Schedule Account Payable Jobs?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to maintain email template for Account Statement...
entry.content:
Please follow the steps in Output Management – Customize Email Form for Payme... - SAP Community. 

Note: Although this article mentions Payment Advice, the email template setup for Account Statement is the same. For example, in app Output Parameter Determination, select "Account Statement" for the field "Show Rules for" instead of "Payment Advice".

entry.title: Datasphere performance issue
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

   I am facing some performance issues with datasphere modeling. Here is my design structures:

Background: We have to create SAC report based on COPA Actual/Plan Data and some other External Data as well.

Modeling Steps refer to above:

1. Preload COPA Actual Data(20 M Records), Budget Data(1 M Records), External Data(10 K Records) to local Table and store table data in memory. Then create views based on local tables and make projections to reduce the no. of columns. Filters and Aggregations are also applied to reduce the total no. of records.

2. Use Input parameters to limit amount of data access.

3. Create UNION for Actual and Plan data

4. Create UNION for External data and above(3)

5. Aggregation based on final data structure

6. Various Calculated column(simple calculation) created

7. Fact source view created(Measures: 110 / Attribute: 45) and used by Analytic Model

SAC then use this Analytic Model for Reporting

Now here comes the trouble: 

1. When I Preview data in the Analytic Model, it takes 30~40 seconds to show the result, the acceptable response time is within 10 secs.

2. While the model is consumed by SAC, as we create more calculations(YTD, Last year YTD...etc) SAC crashes.

Is there any suggestion for performance improvement ?

Thanks a lot

entry.title: Re: Which website is the best to learn a SAPUI5 javascript language?
entry.content: there is no ui5 javascript. javascript is javascript, it has nothing to do with ui5.

entry.title: Re: Explore: Securing SAP GUI with SAP Secure Login Service
entry.content: This is great blog post. One thing from customer maybe is, it is still complicated as it involves more software piece and component i.e. SAP Secure Login Service..

entry.title: Re: Unable to convert an SAP Script as a PDF and send it...
entry.content:
Hi There,

Thank you for your response. I did create a test program and thing there may be an issue converting from lt_pdf to ev_pdf_xstring; but not completely sure of the reason behind it.

If I use the FM GUI_DOWLOAD with lt_pdf; it creates a PDF file on the desktop; however when I try to convert to XSTRING; using the FM SCMS_BINARY_TO_XSTRING ; that is when & where the issue is occuring ( in my opinion ).

When I convert the XSTRING (in this case - ev_pdf_xstring ) back to Binary Table the reconversion gives a totally different output to what was in lt_pdf intially.

Hope the image below does a better job explaining the issue:
when lt_pdf was first created it had 52 rows and 2 columns and then converted to XSTRING and if you try to convert it back to BIN DATA  you get the 52 rows but only column 1.

So I think the data is getting lost somewhere or I am totally wrong in my understanding so far :).

Regards,

Pablo Ghosh Roy

entry.title: Re: Cash based Ledger
entry.content:
Must the new ledger be defined as Standard ledger?

Can i set it as extension ledger with underlying ledger = 0L?

entry.title: How to Access SAP Build Process trigger Forms with out any authentication?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We have developed a sample SAP Build process Form trigger application, normally if we want to access the Form trigger, we have to deploy the Form into work zone and access it with credentials. 





Is there any way we can access the developed Form without any credentials (as a public Form), so that anyone with app link can access the application.

Can anyone please help on this.

Thanks in Advance,
Ramya T.

entry.title: how to Integrate HID Fingerprint Reader in SAP UI5/Fiori and CAP in BAS
entry.content:
I am creating a web application with CAP and SAP UI5 using SAP fiori elements in SAP BAS and I need to implement the use of a HID Digital Persona U.are.U® 4500 Fingerprint Reader to capture a person's biometric data (fingerprint).

I have tried to integrate the use of the Chrome WebApi to connect to the device with the following code:

const filters = [
        {
            vendorId: 1466,
            productId: 10
        }
    ];
    
    const devices = await navigator.usb.requestDevice({ filters: filters }).then(device => {
        console.log(device.productName);      
        console.log(device.manufacturerName);
        console.log(device)
        var select = device;
        return select.open();
      }).catch(error => { console.error(error); });

But when I try to run it, it returns the following:

Does anyone know how I could solve this error?
or perhaps know of any other way to do this?

The WebApi documentation is as follows:
https://developer.chrome.com/docs/capabilities/usb?hl=es-419

And documentation on the use of the device on the web
https://hidglobal.github.io/digitalpersona-authentication/index.html

However, I have not been able to understand how to integrate this last one into SAP UI5

Thank you very much for your help!!

SAP Fiori SAP Fiori Elements SAP Cloud Application Programming Model SAP Business Application Studio SAP HANA Cloud JavaScript #UI5 SAP Cloud Applications Studio SAP Fiori Client SAP Fiori Cloud SAP Business Technology Platform SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment HTML5

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP: Edit Button in the List Report
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes, you can enable this via enabling the Mass Edit - see https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/965ef5b2895641bc9b6cd44f1bd0eb4d for more information! Note that you cannot edit with this the records that have a draft version!

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: DTP failing with error : “odp_prefetch/error 000001”
entry.content:
I just changed the connection client between BW/4HANA and SAP S/4,
　An error occurred in part of the connection to S/4.
　
　The error occurred in the DTP execution process that uses delta updates,
　There was no particular dump on ST22, and the error log in the process chain,
　The error log in the process chain showed only the error “odp_prefetch/error 000001”.
　
　I found the following knowledge question about a similar error, but it did not contain a solution,
　The solution was not listed.
　https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/dtp-failing-with-error-object-not-found/qaq-p/12486126

　I would appreciate it if you could provide me with any possible countermeasures or points to look at in the above.
　The error was caused by a delta update,
　If you have any information, please let us know.
　
　Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: How to consume RESTful Cloud API from SAP with JSON request - MS Dynamics
entry.content: It's really useful for my POC, thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP: Edit Button in the List Report
entry.content:
Hi Lars,

If it is a custom build list report the below BLOG can be followed.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/crudq-using-fiori-elements-cds-list-report-object-page-and-enable-editing/ba-p/13573068

Note: Mass editing is possible whereas bulk editing is not possible as of now.
Mass Edit - Select Multiple values and provide the same value for all.
Bulk Edit - Select Multiple values and provide individual values.


Warm Regards
Surya L

entry.title: Re: Some EWM Performance Bottlenecks
entry.content:
Hi @Daniil 

Really appreciated sharing the information.

Seem we also have S/4hana-EWM integration bottlenecks issue with our decentralized system where we are using RF scanner in the operational basis with automatic running EWM tasks by customized programs.  Please could you find some such scenarios as below.

Inbound receiving process:

  1. Using RF scanner to scan pallet/cartons number for counting
  2. Operator confirmed scanned quantity
  3. Create ERP Inbound delivery (Bapi)
  4. Inbound deliveries are distributed to EWM
  5. Perform EWM packing for goods with serial management
  6. Confirm EWM GR
  7. Create EWM warehouse task for put-away

(from step 3 to 7 are running by customized program automatically in backgrounds)

On the above scenario, we found that the program is working only till step 4. And lost steps 5-7. This is only happening some time randomly so, our Abaper confirmed that it’s not programming/coding issue.

As we checked in details, There are some gaps between step 3 and 4. Some inbound deliveries that failed in such case take longer time to replicate itself to EWM Inbound. Mostly, it take more than 5 seconds.

Example; IB# 180477862 created in ERP at 09:41:09

Got created successfully in EWM at 09:41:29. There are 20 seconds gap here.

Based on the above example, we suspect that this is the root cause of, why we lost steps 5-7.

Is this match with your topic, would you share your thoughts please? we read your suggestions about ‘to avoid high load peeks on EWM Side’ but we are not sure what should we start doing it.

 

Thank you and Best regards.

Akkarapon N.

entry.title: Re: Unable to connect to Datasphere using the CLI
entry.content:
Hello, I keep on encountering an error message that I can't log in to Datasphere using CLI. After putting in client ID and secret it opens a browser that prompts for login, after browser login it displays "Thank you, you can close this window now".

However, in cmd it displays "Failed to log in to your account using interactive OAuth authentication".

Note that our Datasphere has been switched to use SSO from our MS Entra, I'm not sure if this is a factor?

entry.title: Re: DTP failing with error : “odp_prefetch/error 000001”
entry.content:
A log of the error is also provided below.


Start now ID/Process: DTPR_20240827YYYYYYYYYYYY_1 2 RSAR 051 S
Prefetch of DataPackage: 000001 started: 20,240,827,094,829.4171240 RSAR 051 S
Runtime for Prefetch of DP: 000001 ended: 20,240,827,094,829.4444410 RSAR 051 S
MicroSeconds: 27,317 RSAR 051 S
Value of Sy-subrc: 0 RSAR 051 S
Value of l_no_more_data: X RSAR 051 S
Rows in table lt_return: 2 RSAR 051 S
odp_prefetch/error 000001 RSBK 018 I

entry.title: Re: Minimum required SAP Kernel Patchlevel for SLES 15 (S...
entry.content:
PAM is the actual place to find SAP kernel vs OS flavor and major release info.

If the major release for example SLES15 is found in PAM page of your SAP product, all SPs are automatically supported. You are advised to patch to the latest patch level.

This isn't the case for HANA DB host where every individual SP has to be tested and released separately by SAP. The release info is updated in note 2235581.

entry.title: Re: What Are You Looking Forward to Learning or Doing at Devtoberfest This Year?
entry.content: Mostly i am interested in Integrations Suite, SAP Activate, LeanIX, Signavio and CloudALM.

Many thanks,

phongth

entry.title: Theory Of Constraints (TOC) – in SAP Planning & Manufacturing
entry.content:
Dear SAP Friends,

Happy Reading !!!!!!!!

Welcome to one of the Interesting Topic about Theory Of Constraints (TOC) in SAP

Introduction

The concept of Theory of Constraints (ToC) was first introduced in the book “The Goal” by Dr Eli Goldratt, as a management philosophy that treats an organization as an interlinked, interdependent system rather than just a collection of independent processes or functions.

In principle, The Theory of Constraints explains that within a chain of dependent activities (process steps in a manufacturing unit), the production is determined by the weakest link, called as the constraint or the bottleneck in the process. Here in this blog post we will be discussing about how the TOC is applied in SAP solutions for the manufacturing industries.

The ToC is a refined methodology that encourages organizations to identify the limiting factors (constraints or bottlenecks) within their processes. Once a constraint is identified, the goal is to utilize it to its maximum potential and raise its capacity so that it is no longer a limiting factor.

Implications of Bottlenecks: When there is a bottleneck in the organization’s production facility or in the processes, all other steps of that facility slow down to accommodate the bottleneck and materials accumulate along the production line – which results in unnecessary downtime at the facility and finally responsible for  the loss of the revenue or the profits. To avoid material accumulation and process downtime it’s important to be familiar with where current bottlenecks exist in the production and immediately fix it.

Benefits

Implementing the Theory of Constraints in the manufacturing organizations has given significant results for the organizations across the globe. An independent study published in the paper in Victoria University of Wellington, New Zealand discovered that the organizations achieved the following benefits:

Potential benefits after implementing ToC in the organizations.

Identification of Bottlenecks:

The key focus of the Theory of Constraints is to identify the constraints or bottlenecks in any of the processes and explore the possibilities about how to eliminate or reduce their impact. The concept does that by deciding the following areas:

  • What to change
  • What to change it to
  • How can we fix this to make it right?

Example of bottlenecks

Let’s take an example to understand the Theory of Constraints as a chain of processes in a manufacturing organization. When a chain breaks, it breaks in one spot: which is the weakest link in the processes. This means that while other links may have been able to hold more weight, the entire chain could never hold more than the weight capacity of its weakest link.

Bottleneck: Weak process in the entire process chain

 

Theory Of Constraints works on addressing this weak link. The steps to identify and eliminate the weak link is as follows:

 

The Five Steps

Implementing the ToC methodology for resolution of difficulties in processes by following the five-step process:

Identify:                Determine what blocks the progress and take steps to correct it.

Exploit:                  Utilize current assets to enhance the constraint’s throughput instantly.

Subordinate:        All future methods must adhere to and support the restrictions.

Elevate:                 Consider what further enhancements may be adopted to overcome the bottleneck or the constraint.

Repeat:                 This step will be frequently repeated once the restriction has been “broken” or until it shifted to somewhere else.

Theory of Constraints: Drum, Buffer, Rope

Drum-Buffer-Rope is a method of synchronizing production to the constraint while minimizing inventory and Work-In-Process(WIP) of the manufacturing process.

Drum: It is the constraint. The speed at which the constraint runs sets the flow for the entire process and determines total throughput. SAP: Identify the bottleneck (capacity).

Buffer: It is the buffered inventory needed to maintain consistent production. It ensures that brief interruptions and fluctuations in non-constraints do not affect the constraint. SAP: Protect the bottleneck (material)

Rope: It is a signal generated by the constraint indicating that some amount of inventory has been consumed. SAP: Optimize the bottleneck (throughput) via synchronizing the flow with releasing the orders.

ToC: Drum, Buffer Rope

 

Theory of Constraints: In SAP S/4HANA Manufacturing

Theory of Constraints: Uses deterministic planning in combination with Consumption-Based Planning(CBP). MRP algorithm in S/4HANA executes reorder point-based planning and deterministic planning, MRP postprocessing can be used with filters to focus on particular orders. The process and configuration of ToC in SAP is as follows:

ToC: SAP S/4HANA configuration and processing steps

 

As discussed, Theory of Constraints in SAP can be implemented in S/4HANA MRP and in SAP IBP, if we use Customized MRP Type (CMT) for Theory of Constraints, we need to customize the MRP types that we want to use within ToC in the customizing settings for CMT.

If the maintained MRP type in the customizing settings for CMT is assigned to a material in the MRP 1 view, the material is planned in the planning run according to the ToC logic and associated key figures will be determined. The advanced MD04 is an integral part of the SCM Consulting Solutions and serves as an add-on program for the SAP system using transaction /SAPLOM/MD04. The diagram represents the MRP 1 view of material with the MRP Type as TC which is configured for Theory of Constraints.

MRP Type defined for Theory of Constraints

 

For more details, please refer to https://help.sap.com and for configuring MRP, please refer to https://help.sap.com/doc/4df97cbe3cf947878b55a0572faa21fe/2023.1/en-US/CMT_EN_App.pdf

 

Theory Of Constraints: In SAP IBP

Demand Driven Material Requirement Planning (DDMRP) follows the philosophy of Theory of Constraints (ToC). Key focus of DDMRP is on the reduction of dependence with sales forecasting, improvement in the manufacturing times and reducing the variability in the supply chain ecosystem and the reduce the bullwhip effect.

MRP – Forecast driven supply planning – The entire BOM dependent. MRP propagates the demand signals (forecast/MPS) through BOM creating planned orders. Any changes in forecast are amplified down the supply chain.

As DDMRP works on decoupling which allows the placement of system buffers, so the variability is minimized, and system flow is maximized. A dynamic dimensioning is carried out from the expected demand and the profiles defined according to the typology of each product.

Minimizing the bullwhip effect

Inventory throughout a supply chain is kept at decoupling points, creating a safety buffer that covers unplanned occurrences, such as delivery delays or changes in customer demand.

Demand driven supply chain. Demand propagation is decoupled, and signal variability is absorbed by the inventory buffers. Execution is driven by sales orders or triggered by downstream buffer status.

DDMRP Setup in SAP IBP

The calculation of the Average Daily Usage(ADU) is automated in the tool, and all can be analysed and modified, either in Fiori or directly in Excel planning views. Following are the key steps to perform strategic and tactical planning.

SAP IBP DDMRP process steps

Conclusion

Theory of Constraints has the potential to change an organization’s way of thinking. Without any specific further investments, the Theory of Constraints shows an increase in the available capacity, it facilitates to use what you already have rather than quickly purchasing new equipment or expanding your activities.

For more information on other steps, please visit the community page. Here you will be able to leverage learnings from SAP Planning and Manufacturing solutions, SAP news, SAP customer stories and other resources to stay ahead and ensure business continuity.

If you have remaining questions and need further guidance, navigate to SAP’s Ask a Question site to receive answers from SAP Supply Chain experts.

entry.title: Re: Customer Business Partner Change Log History Query
entry.content:
Hi Kedalene,

have a look here

SELECT 
TOP 1 
 UserSign AS [CreateUser]
,CreateDate 
,CreateTS
,UserSign2 [UpdateUser]
,UpdateDate
,UpdateTS
,* 
FROM OCRD

You can join to OUSR for UserName

regards Lothar

entry.title: How to remove Shipping notification form MD04 and stock will not consider in MRP Run
entry.content:
1. In MD04 I have the current available quantity is 8,400 quantity.

2. Shipping notification is 8,400 quantity.

3. In the 27th demand it will consume the currently available quantity now total available quantity is 0

4. In last independent quantity shows 8,400 quantities available

Our customer is asking why the shipping notification is considered as an available quantity. So I need to hide or the shipping notification quantity will not be considered as an availability quantity while running the MRP.

I have tried to remove the LT MRP relevant indicator in the configuration it is not allowed to be removed.

Anyone, please help me with this scenario?

entry.title: Re: Some EWM Performance Bottlenecks
entry.content:
Hi @Akkarapon_N ,

Yes, you have asynchronous distribution of the delivery in the middle of the process. Without knowing details I would say, that you could try to create delivery on EWM side, this process looks like Classic EGR usage (if you create delivery with reference to purchase order). If you keep process as it is, you can make sure that smq2 on EWM side is so empty as possible, and reprocessing job is well planned (not just one job, which reprocess all the queus every 5 minutes). But redesign would be in my opinion better approach. Another possible option could be to split this process, that the user is not waiting till the process end, if he waits because of the label, you can print it without destination bin, and serial numbers user can provide on ERP side during first step. If you have further questions let me know.

Regards,

Daniil

entry.title: Re: Kernel Patch to support TLSv1.3 - SAP Note 3318423
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

If you wanted to know which older Netweaver Kernels (such as Netweaver 72x, Netweaver 74x or Netweaver 753/754 Kernels) support TLSv1.3 -- then the answer is *NONE* of these Kernels and Netweaver Release support the substantially backwards-incompatible protocol version TLSv1.3 at the moment!

The 793 STACK 100 Kernel was released a week ago, and it is essentially the very first Kernel, which in combination with CommonCryptoLib 8.5.56 can hopefully configured for use TLSv1.3.
We hope to have found and fixed all problems in the 793 Kernel and in CommonCryptoLib 8 caused by the backwards-incompatible behavior of TLSv1.3.

There exist no material real-world security benefits from use of TLSv1.3 over the use of TLSv1.2 with PFS cipher suites using ECDHE key exchange.  (and TLSv1.3 produces a little more Carbon Dioxide for this).

Before considering a downport of all the necessary Kernel changes to cope with the backwards-incompatible TLSv1.3 behaviour into older Netweaver Kernels, we first have to gather interop experience from real-world usage of TLSv1.3.

Best regards,
SAP Security Team

entry.title: GRC HR Trigger considers all Plugin system for Change/Termination Access Requests
entry.content:
Dear Gurus/Experts,

We have GRC AC 12.0 HR Trigger Standard Functionality Implemented in the system and have multiple plugin systems, we are using GRC->AC->Maintain AC Apps & BRF+ Func. Mapping HR Trigger function. GRC is working fine for Action "New Hire" (New user to system and mapping of Roles as per position), whereas in termination/change of employee cases, Action "Terminate" OR "Change" employee. GRC considers again all of the plugin system for Access Request, result of which requests are reaching Escape Route since user does not always exist in all Plugin systems.

What can be done so that GRC will only consider systems as per position mapping OR where user exists for Termination/Change employee Actions?

Note: We know its necessary, but all the config details cannot be added here. Let me know if you can point out the required one, I should provide.

Thanks in Advance!

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Good day!

Here are the Task-3 validations.

  1. Preview the App showing all the columns, search, and filter options in the CDS view entity.

2. Search records based on a specific value from 'Description' field and select an available value from the 'Status' field.

 

BR,

Naveen

entry.title: Re: How to use MAN_CALL to send other document than MSDS
entry.content:
Hello SAP provides these processes: PRINT_CALL; SD_CALL, MAN_CALL, SUB_CALL, EXP_CALL; you can define different cover letter in "MAN_CALL" in comparison to "SD_CALL"; this is only customizing.

But if you believe the customizing option does not solve your probelm.. I am sorry. There is in SAP standard no other option available to define the "Cover Sheet". And regarding the eMail context.. you should (as mentioned) not combine the "SDS&MSDS" email part with something different. But here you need only to perform a "copy" of a SAP function module and then you can solve the topic (if i remember correct)

Wish you the best

C.B.

entry.title: Re: TRM: FTR_CREATE screen
entry.content: Please repost..

entry.title: Re: Unable to upgrade HANA database
entry.content:
Hi Krish_SAP

Please try below steps:

1) Remove all customized code from SBO_SP_TransactionNotification and SBO_SP_PostTransacionNotice Stored Procedures.

2) Start your customer database upgrade again.

In case, if the upgrade will still fail then please find the log file in the default log folder as per SAP Note: "2380811".
- Setup.B1 UpgradeWizardPidxxxx_xxxxxxxxxxxxxx.txt – UpgradeLogFile of the Wizard with results of the pre&post upgrade checks

- Setup.B1Setuppidxxxx_xxxxxxxxxxxxxx.txt – UpgradeLogFile of the whole upgrade process

- Setup.B1loggerPidxxxx_xxxxxxxxxxxxxx.txt – UpgradeLogFile of the whole upgrade process)

Please create incident using component SBO-BC-UW and attach all above logs to investigate issue by us.

Kind Regards

Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Sales order with discount amount at header level
entry.content:
Thank you for your advice, Fancy.

I changed condition type and tried again, but it didn't work as I expected.

I'm not sure but it was calculated like discount price x number of item lines.

There are 2 item lines. I set discount price - 5000 JPY and then system calculated -5000 x 2 = - 10,000.

Is there any settings I should do?

 

Best Regards,

Yuriko Funatsu

entry.title: Re: Which website is the best to learn a SAPUI5 javascrip...
entry.content:
The walkthroughs that form part of the sdk documentation assist with the process of learning SAPUI5. SAPUI5 is an HTML5 framework made of all the elements of an HTML5 framework. These include HTML, Javascript and Styling.

SAPUI5 is very "opinionated" when it comes to styling meaning it largely imposes a style on anyone employing it given the imperative to achieve coherence (a similarity) across the apps that are produced using it. This is because SAP wants its apps to look similar across different apps within its portfolio making it easier for users to familiarise themselves with the different apps.

Given the above there are 2 key elements to learn when composing SAPUI5 apps. These are the javascript code files (oftentimes controllers) and then the associated views that largely define what controls a user will see.

SAPUI5 has a very rich set of controls that can be incorporated in views that end up being pages (SAPUI5 does produce an SPA (single page app) but its still ok to notionally to see a view as a separate page that has a master page in case you come from a more traditional web app background).

As concerns javascript SAPUI5 js files present a minor variation on how traditional JS is written BUT it is javascript. So learning JS from any site is fine. This will be easily used within the .Js files making up an SAPUI5 App.

The HTML is oftentimes best avoided by employing views written in an XML type language. The XML gets transformed into HTML at runtime so you need only become familiar with the XML language that produces the HTML views (it is the recommended approach). I can elaborate if required.

Please feel free to reach out for any further details

entry.title: Re: Unable to add User for Logging into the Authentication Service in SAP B1 10.0 FP2402 MSSQL Vers
entry.content:
Hi Surya

Please provide error screenshot and steps performed to add user.

Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: Re: Product Compliance in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
Hello

in context of:

"Also, I thought I read in the material that if you use product compliance, you cannot use EHS classic?"

this is not correct. The current "Product Compliance 2023" solution has some "switches" (three? four?) I can not remember..). Any how... by "switch" you use "Product Compliance" (you "activate" Product Compliance process by using the switches).

Example: If you "switch" the DG par on then you CAN NOT USE EHS CLASSIC ANY MORE but you MUST use the full "Product Compliance" part (of DG only !). But you still can use SDS, SVT, GLM etc processes in EHS Classic

In context of:

I have a question with regards to Dangerous Goods Management. I see that a lot of dangerous goods regulations are pre-loaded for activation. If there is a regulation that does not yet exist, and we create our own, I see the only option is to use a text based compliance pattern, rather than a content-based and seems limited. how does the classification process work in that scenario? I don't see any option to add for example UN lists? If not possible, can you advise the best approach in the business process to classify?

=> please check the many Blogs of SAP.  In a nutshell: 2023 on premise is not the final solution. So the DG part is enhanced by SAP stepwise. READ THE IMPORTANT OSS NOTE TO GET MORE DETAILS (and CHECK THE ROADMAP of "on premise" and of "Cloud" version of "Product Compliance"

As a reference: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/product-compliance-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition-2408/ba-p/13780737

and 

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-blogs-by-members/about-product-compliance-on-premise-version-2023-introduction-for-beginners/ba-p/13739600

In a nutshell: version 2023 does not cover 100% EHS classic; if you are not willing to use Cloud version: you need to check your business. If the "function" overlap is good enough or not and if not.. then you should still can use EHS Classic

FOR LICENCE PART: GET N TOCU WITH SAP; For ROADMAP PART: CHECK SAP MARKETPLACE / ROADMAP explorer. Both topics are not EASY to understand and the SAP ROADMAP can change at any point in time (some functionality come earlier or later as planned)

entry.title: How can I prevent the "delete" key from being deleted from the alv?
entry.content:
Hi Masters,

When the user presses the "delete" key from the keyboard, they can delete the row in the alv. I want to prevent this. My "Satır Sil" button does this task and should do this with the "Satir Sil" button.




How can I prevent the "delete" key from being deleted from the alv?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Performance is poor for Select query on MBEW Table
Re: SAP PM MRO Inventory Spares
entry.content: N/A

entry.title: Re: SAP PM MRO Inventory Spares
entry.content:
Hello,

Of course you can create new material types and storage locations to manage your spare parts, as with both info you segregate systemically what belongs to maintenance and production.

SAP does not have restrictions on doing that, and all the separation necessary to not affect the MRP planning of production materials, for instance, can all be managed using SAP standard capabilities.

Cheers.

Regards

Jasmit

entry.title: Re: 2020 SAP Crystal Report Product Key Not Valid
entry.content:
I've seen this problem with earlier versions where the key format changed from the very initial release (SP0) to a proper production release.

Try downloading again and do a reinstall. Failing that, the only way to test a key is to use another install of Crystal Reports and add it using the Licence Manager dialogue (from the Help menu)

It works only with admin user.

Is it not supported in WTS?

entry.title: Re: problem in hedge management automatic designation
entry.content: Hi Faizan365

entry.title: SAP Engineering Control Center (ECTR-PLM) application Turkish language support
entry.content:
Introduction
In a globalized world, the ability to use software applications in local languages significantly enhances the user experience. However, not all software solutions offer support in every language. SAP Engineering Control Center (ECTR) is one such application, and unfortunately, it does not provide support for the Turkish language. This limitation can be a significant barrier for Turkish-speaking users. To address this issue, I have undertaken a detailed project to add Turkish language support to the ECTR application, translating all menus into Turkish. The ECTR application integrates with CATIA, Word, Excel, and PowerPoint, using an ECTR toolbar. I have also adapted the ECTR commands on this toolbar into Turkish. When SOLIDWORKS, NX, CATIA, Word, Excel, and PowerPoint are used in Turkish, the ECTR toolbar will automatically be in Turkish as well. In this article, I will share the process and the results I have achieved.

Project Objective and Importance
SAP ECTR is a powerful tool used for managing engineering data and processes. However, the lack of Turkish language support made it challenging for Turkish-speaking users to use the application effectively. My goal was to remove this barrier, enabling the application to be used more efficiently by a broader audience. This not only improved the user experience but also allowed companies to adapt to international software solutions more quickly.

Starting the Process: Preparation and Planning
The first step of the project was to analyze the current situation and plan the necessary steps. I examined the structure of the ECTR application and the available language files. One of the biggest challenges during this process was the complexity of the language files and the technical nature of some terms. However, to overcome these challenges, I first conducted thorough preparation.

Technical Process: Updating Language Files
To translate all menus and error messages in the ECTR application into Turkish, I needed to manually update the language files. This process involved the following steps:

  • Identifying Language Files: The first step was to identify the language files in ECTR. These files are usually in XML or TXT format. After identifying these files, I started preparing to translate the English texts within them into Turkish.
  • Translation Process: After reviewing the language files, I carefully translated each text segment into Turkish. At this stage, it was crucial to accurately translate technical terms and maintain the integrity of the meaning. Proficiency in Turkish grammar and technical terminology played a significant role in this process.
  • Updating the Files: Once the translations were completed, I updated the language files and tested them within the application. This stage was critical for identifying and correcting potential errors. During the testing process, I made necessary adjustments, considering the user experience, and continued to update based on feedback.

ECTR Integrations
The ECTR application integrates with popular software solutions like SOLIDWORKS, NX, CATIA, Word, Excel, and PowerPoint. This integration is facilitated through the ECTR toolbar. During my localization work, I also adapted the ECTR commands on this toolbar into Turkish. If SOLIDWORKS, NX, CATIA, Word, Excel, and PowerPoint applications are used in Turkish, the ECTR toolbar will automatically be in Turkish as well. This enables users to transition between ECTR and other applications more smoothly and efficiently.

 

Testing and Validation Process
After completing the translations, I thoroughly tested the ECTR application. The testing process aimed to ensure that all functions of the application worked correctly. During this process, user feedback was particularly important. Based on feedback from test users, I revised some translations and menu structures.

Challenges and Solutions
The main challenges I faced during this project were:

  • Technical Terms: Accurately translating technical terms without losing meaning was a significant challenge. To overcome this, I sought help from individuals proficient in engineering and software terminology.
  • File Structure: The structure and format of ECTR's language files were sometimes complex. To address this, I carefully studied and understood the file structure and relationships.
  • Testing Process: Comprehensive testing was necessary to verify that all functions of the application worked correctly. During this process, I tested all user scenarios and made necessary corrections.

Results and Achievements
As a result of this project, the SAP ECTR application can now be used with Turkish language support. This allows Turkish-speaking users to use the application more comfortably and efficiently. The main benefits of the project are:

  • Improved User Experience: Turkish language support has made it easier for users to understand and use the application.
  • Increased Efficiency: Removing the language barrier allowed users to carry out their workflows more quickly and effectively.
  • Global Competitiveness: Turkish language support enabled Turkish companies to adapt to global software solutions more quickly and enhanced their competitiveness.

Future Steps
Following this successful project, the next step is to ensure that ECTR provides users with information about solving existing error messages along with the current error warnings.

Conclusion
Adding Turkish language support to the SAP Engineering Control Center (ECTR) application was a process that required technical knowledge and precision. I believe that completing this project successfully has provided significant convenience for Turkish-speaking users. The experiences I gained and the results I achieved during this process will serve as inspiration for future projects. Overcoming language barriers in technology to make it more accessible is a crucial step in enhancing user experience and productivity.

entry.title: Re: Changes in Workflow is not reflecting in quality system
entry.content:
Hi Karthi,

Thank you for the reponse.

I have checked the versions. I am having the latest version available in our QS4 system.. And new reports are taking the latest version only. But the old ones are still with the old version.

entry.title: Re: Sales organization is not defined error in intercompa...
entry.content:
Hi,

The sales organization is not defined error in intercompany billing is mainly due to the internal customer not extended to both sales areas i.e supplying and receiving. After you extend it you have to again do the new order/delivery/billing because the changes won't affect the error billing document.

Thankss.

entry.title: Re: Default account assignment for cost element in FS00
entry.content:
Hello Venkat, In case of depreciation posting cost object should be ideally picked from Asset master for this make sure you have done setup in T-code ACSET for company code/depreciation area combination.

Another option could be OKB9 where per company code/GL combination you can assign cost center but not suggested as different asset can have different cost center.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: problem in hedge management automatic designation
entry.content:
Hi Faizan365

couple of questions:

  • automatic designation is activated in hedge area setup?
  • did you use a hedge request as a base for the FX Forward? 
  • Hedging Classification is maintained in the deal?
  • if all of them yes -> any issues with the designation itself? Market data, etc.? Could you check the log in TPM104?

Best, Lars

entry.title: Re: SAP DM: Change between OEE reason codes which belong...
entry.content:
Hello,

thank you for addressing the issue. It is a known gap which is planned to be closed in one of the next releases. A change of reason code is not supported unless the status of the resource is changed as well.

Best regards, Harry

entry.title: SAP CRM S/4 HANA: Agent inbox custom button functionality
entry.content:
Hi Community,

i need urgent help. I have been assigned a task where the functional team has configured a custom button in toolbar of agent inbox through configuration. and behind that an event needs to be triggered. whenever an item from inbox will be selected and user click on that button then event should be triggered in that event i need to write a code to create notification in sap.

Right now i am struggling on how to view that content of selected inbox item so that on behalf of that i can call standard bapi to create notification in the system.

I have successfully triggered the event but i am struggling with how can i view the selected item content. i need code for that. 

any help would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Tab Layout Assignment to Asset Class - Purpose of Tra...
entry.content:
I learned that the multiple options are a legacy hangover from a now redundant idea.  
By default, the group “OTHERS” will be used.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Contest Official Rules

entry.title: I’m facing an issue with mass updating a date field in a Fiori List Report using OData V4 batch call
entry.content:
Problem:

Single batch updates work fine.

Mass updates fail entirely if there’s any error, even for valid entries.

What We’ve Tried:

Implemented two-way data binding.

Attempted to continue processing after an error in batch processing, but it didn’t work.

 

Questions:

How can we ensure valid entries are updated even if some entries have errors?

Is there a way to handle errors at the entry level rather than the batch level?

What are the best practices for mass updates with error handling using OData V4 in a Fiori List Report?

Any guidance or examples would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!
#odatav4, SAP Fiori Elements , SAP Fiori Makers SAPUI5

entry.title: Re: Purchase requisition not getting created in subcontra...
entry.content: I have maintained the combination in OMG0 and now its working. Thanks a lot Jagdeep

In Sap B1 we can allocate Multiple Distribution rule in Single row with Manual distribution Rule Option. I am trying to do same with Service layer api. But am not able to find any object which we can use to create the same using api. 
Attached screen shot of same screen

SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA

entry.title: Re: oDataService Request is called multiple times
entry.content: Please check if your service call method is calling from any other methods, and in some cases odata model refresh also calls all requests related to that service. So check your model refresh also.

entry.title: Re: Unable to convert an SAP Script as a PDF and send it via OData (for PDF Viewer Functionality)
entry.content:
Hi All,

I managed to find a resolution to the issue...

1. Use FM RSPO_RETURN_SPOOLJOB to read the spool and the otf data. ( Type - tsfotf )

2. Use FM SX_OBJECT_CONVERT_OTF_PDF to convert the OTF data to PDF.

3. Use FM SCMS_BINARY_TO_XSTRING to convert the BIN Data ( PDF ) to XSTRING. ( Sample code provided below )

 

 

4. Pass that to the ODATA method get_stream and it works like a charm.

Thank you so much everyone for your suggestions and response.

Regards,

Pablo Ghosh Roy

entry.title: Re: Tab Layout Assignment to Asset Class - Purpose of Tra...

entry.title: Re: Minimum required SAP Kernel Patchlevel for SLES 15 (S...
entry.content:
Thanks @chico_zhu ,

I already went through PAM for the different products and releases hosted in our datacenter - with AIX 7.3 and SLES 15 as well.

The thing is: there are no Kernel Patchlevels mentioned in PAM for AIX 7.3 - so one would assume, all Kernel PLs are fine - but then there is note 1780629 with more details to the required PLs.

So I assumed that there would be some kind of SAP note or the like to answer my question as there is for AIX.

GL is marked as open line item in FS00 and i can see it in FBL3N however unable to see ir in F-53 as it is showing that doxument contains no line items.

Please advise.

entry.title: Re: About cloudready type when creating an adaptation pro...
entry.content:
Hello JISOO,

for SAP Fiori apps to be extensible via adaptation project, there must be an entry
Extensibility via SAPUI5 Adaptation Projects : Supported

Please refer to the prerequisites mentioned in Extending an SAP Fiori Application for S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP BTP, ABAP Environment

Best regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: Unable to upgrade HANA database
entry.content: Not Ready means that there are some connections to this database. you may see from what host and what PID (process ID) on your second screenshot. go to this host and check these PIDs.

entry.title: Email trigger to customer once freight order/freight booking is created using PPF action
entry.content:
Hi Folks

Anyone has idea how to trigger email notification automatically to the sold to party (Customer) once the freight booking is created using PPF actions.? Kindly advise configuration steps.

Note: No need to attach any forms, email with some information like FB details etc.

entry.title: Re: Creating forms in SAC
entry.content: @FxGk can we add data from this form to a model ? in what way doesnt matter

entry.title: Re: will pMRP consider open sales order and Production or...
entry.content: There are no parameters to in schedule PMRP app to considering the sales order, Production orders, Purchase orders, Purchase requisition, Firmed Planned orders, stocks and Reservations. Its just matching the PIR with capacity. That to not consider the previous loads. Also If I change the PIR values in the columns proportionally but the delivery value is mismatching (Reducing 1 qty from one month and adding to another month = Expectation 100% delivery but not). I hope we can use this PMRP only for future demands where no receipts are there like CM01
